sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-02-28 06:00
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 36:35
- Elapsed time: 36:38
- Elevation gain: 56.6 m
- Average heart rate: 177.2 bpm
- Max heart rate: 189 bpm
- Average watts: 218 W
- Average speed: 11.5 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `178.2 bpm`, ranging from `165.1` to `185.7 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `166.8 spm`, with a working range of `164.2` to `169.4 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `167.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `165.7 spm` (-2.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:13 /km` across `7.006 km` in `36:35` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:03 /km` and second-half pace was `5:23 /km` (+20 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `177.2 bpm` average and `189 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `169.7 bpm` in the first half and `184.6 bpm` in the second (+14.9 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `36:35` out of `36:38` elapsed (99.9%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `4` stop segments and `0.5%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `69.2 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.4 m` and `18.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `28.8 m` in the first half and `40.4 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
